title: Smoke-Cold Saudi-Arabian Perilla Seed Tagliere
description: Buttery, crumbly brunch dish featuring perilla seed deulkkae, smoke-cold, raw-friendly, served on a tagliere.

ingredients.name: Perilla seed deulkkae
ingredients.notes: roasted in a hot oven (4255F) for 10-12 minutes, or until fragrant and slightly darkened

instructions: Grate 1/2 cup of deulkkae in a food processor and set aside.
Mix 2 tablespoons of unsalted butter, softened, with 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a small bowl.
Spread the butter mixture evenly over a 12-inch tagliere or platter.
Arrange the grated deulkkae in a decorative pattern over the butter mixture.
